name: athena
description: A simple app to store your moments in archives. Featuring a special filtering system to easily find what you need.

scripts.build:all: npm run build -w @app/main && npm run build -w @app/preload && npm run build -w @app/renderer
scripts.build:norenderer: npm run build -w @app/main && npm run build -w @app/preload
scripts.dev:main: npm run build:norenderer && cross-env DEV=true npx electron app/entry.mjs
scripts.package: npm install && npm run build:all && electron-forge package
scripts.make: npm install && rimraf ./out && npm run build:all && electron-forge make

author: Mark Martinez
